category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and split-type air conditioners exported from China to Kenya

title.en: China-to-Kenya Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入肯尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Kenya's KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVOC) mandatory pre-shipment inspection, EPRA energy efficiency labelling and MEPS requirements, KS IEC 60335-2-40 safety standard, NEMA ODS refrigerant controls, and CA type-approval obligations for wireless-enabled units.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与肯尼亚KEBS出口前符合性验证（PVOC）强制装船前检验、EPRA能效标签和最低能效标准（MEPS）要求、KS IEC 60335-2-40安全标准、NEMA ODS制冷剂管制及通信管理局无线型号认证义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與肯尼亞KEBS出口前符合性驗證（PVOC）強制裝船前檢驗、EPRA能效標籤和最低能效標準（MEPS）要求、KS IEC 60335-2-40安全標準、NEMA ODS製冷劑管制及通訊管理局無線型號認證義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, registered conformity assessment body decision, KEBS PVOC clearance, EPRA energy label authorisation, NEMA ODS permit, CA type-approval, customs determination, installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current PVOC product scope, KEBS Diamond Mark requirements, EPRA MEPS thresholds, refrigerant ODS obligations, CA licensing requirements, and Kenyan labelling requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、注册符合性评定机构决定、KEBS PVOC放行、EPRA能效标签授权、NEMA ODS许可、通信管理局型号批准、海关裁定、安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在出货、销售或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行PVOC产品范围、KEBS钻石标志要求、EPRA MEPS门槛、制冷剂ODS义务、通信管理局许可要求及肯尼亚标签要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、註冊符合性評定機構決定、KEBS PVOC放行、EPRA能效標籤授權、NEMA ODS許可、通訊管理局型號批准、海關裁定、安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在出貨、銷售或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行PVOC產品範圍、KEBS鑽石標誌要求、EPRA MEPS門檻、製冷劑ODS義務、通訊管理局許可要求及肯尼亞標籤要求。

answer_first.en: KEBS mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVOC) at origin is the critical pre-shipment gate — goods without a valid PVOC certificate will be detained at Nairobi port. Additional gaps include EPRA energy efficiency labelling and MEPS compliance, KS IEC 60335-2-40 safety testing, NEMA ODS refrigerant controls, and CA type-approval for wireless models. CCC is not recognised in Kenya.
answer_first.zh: KEBS在产地强制实施的出口前符合性验证（PVOC）是关键的装船前合规门槛——无有效PVOC证书的货物将在内罗毕港口被扣押。其他合规差距包括EPRA能效标签和最低能效标准合规、KS IEC 60335-2-40安全测试、NEMA ODS制冷剂管制，以及无线型号的通信管理局型号批准。CCC在肯尼亚不被认可。
answer_first.zht: KEBS在產地強制實施的出口前符合性驗證（PVOC）是關鍵的裝船前合規門檻——無有效PVOC證書的貨物將在內羅畢港口被扣押。其他合規差距包括EPRA能效標籤和最低能效標準合規、KS IEC 60335-2-40安全測試、NEMA ODS製冷劑管制，以及無線型號的通訊管理局型號批准。CCC在肯尼亞不被認可。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
